creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
No such problem here. Please read error messages:

Can't locate Locale/gettext.pm in @INC (you may need to install the
Locale::gettext module) (@INC contains:
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.34 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl
/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.34/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.34) at
/usr/local/bin/help2man line 30.

and fix your Perl5 installation.
